title: Armour Bundles
description: Adds a way to quickly swap between armour sets
body:
# Armor Bundles

Small mod that adds an item to allow quickly swapping between armour sets.

## Using an Armor Bundle

To use an Armor Bundle, you need to fill it with armour. This can be done either through the inventory like a regular
bundle,
or by crouch right-clicking with an armour set equipped. To then equip the armour in the bundle, you can either press
one of the two
keybinds to cycle between Armor Bundles in your inventory, or you can right-click while holding one. The bundle will
attempt to automatically store
any currently equipped armour items into a relevant bundle if possible.

Each bundle can store 4 individual stacks of items.
